description: CompositionBlue jersey made of a blended fabric, has a mock neck with a slit v-neckline and notched collar, short raglan sleeves, white piping from the shoulders to the armholes on the front, white panels at the back with branding on the left chest and right sleeveFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry cleanDo not allow to lay on itself when wetLine dryYou'll be displaying Deccan pride with this Chargers jersey even as you cheer your team at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Chargers!' than with this jersey!
